title: Croatian Skillet Hash
description: A hearty breakfast skillet filled with Croatian sausage, potatoes, and vegetables, perfect for a cold morning.
instructions: Heat the skillet oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Croatian sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the sausage from the skillet and set aside.
Add the diced potatoes, sliced onion, and diced bell pepper to the skillet.
Cook, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.
Return the cooked sausage to the skillet and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
Cook's note: This recipe can be made ahead and refrigerated overnight, then reheated in the morning.
